{{Infobox technique
| name = Dance of a Burning World
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Dance of a Burning World Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Dance of a Burning World is an Aetheric [[sword]] art and combat style currently mastered only by [[Raion]]. The technique is founded on the universal truth of constant destruction and the entropy of the universe, requiring the user to accept that everything is perpetually being destroyed. When utilized, the art manifests as intense red or scarlet flames and light that can devour opposing forces. The scale of the technique is highly variable; it can be used to slice through massive creatures, extend for miles behind a strike, or even blaze across hundreds of miles of space when channeled through weapons. At its most extreme levels, such as when magnified by a [[Divine Titan]], the art can appear to burn through entire systems or reach a galactic scale of movement.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dance of a Burning World]] is an Aetheric [[sword]] art.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Dance of the Burning World is an Art used by [[Raion]]'s [[Titan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c32">''The Captain'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Dance of a Burning World]] is represented by [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Dance of a Burning World]] is [[Raion Raithe]]'s [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dance of a Burning World]] is an ability used by [[Raion Raithe]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Knight]] utilizes a specialized technique known as the Dance of a Burning World. This ability functions by igniting a blade of crimson flame around [[Raion]]'s [[sword]]. While the technique is optimized for performing large, wide-area attacks, its use involves the realization that everything surrounding the user is being destroyed.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Dance of a Burning World]] is a technique that uses a blade of crimson flame.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Dance of a Burning World]] is a technique that ignites around [[Raion]]'s [[sword]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Dance of a Burning World]] is optimized for large, wide-area attacks.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Dance of a Burning World]] is a technique used by the [[Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Dance of a Burning World]] involves the knowledge that everything is being destroyed around the user.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dance of a Burning World]] is a [[Combat Art]] that lights the [[void]] on fire.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
